scope_boundary: synthetic replacement-transaction record discipline and finite Lean predicates only; no deployed replacement behavior, runtime route quality, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, source interpretation, or source-derived support-state promotion
transition_reason: The repository now has a replacement-transaction schema, a protocol fixture, finite Replacement Lean predicates, proof adequacy review text that keeps the target narrow, exact source mappings for the Capability Replacement and Rollback chapter, and a synthetic capability replacement harness with valid and expected-invalid fixtures. Those artifacts make field identity, prior and candidate implementations, qualification evidence, regression results, non-widening authority checks, evaluator separation, residual escrow, rollback receipts, approvals, monitor state, promotion blockers, and non-claim boundaries executable at the record level. They still do not establish deployed replacement behavior, runtime route quality, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, source interpretation adequacy, or model behavior.
required_artifacts: deployed capability replacement implementation with real candidate and prior implementations
runtime replacement trace showing accepted, rejected, canaried, committed, and rolled-back transactions
authority-enforcement trace showing candidates cannot widen authority without governance grant
rollback dry run or rollback execution over actual implementation state
regression suite over real candidate and prior implementations
monitor-window result over real workload or replay traces
source interpretation review for replacement and rollback source mappings
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_capability_replacement.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_transitions.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: Capability Replacement and Rollback remains at argument
schema validation checks replacement transaction shape rather than deployed replacement behavior
finite Lean predicates remain useful but too narrow for runtime replacement, evaluator-integrity, authority-enforcement, rollback-execution, or regression-quality claims
source interpretation review and model behavior are not implemented
downgrade_triggers: chapter text interpreted as deployed replacement evidence
synthetic rollback receipt interpreted as real rollback execution
finite Lean replacement predicates treated as deployed replacement behavior
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the synthetic record discipline that passed, or after deployed replacement implementation traces, accepted/rejected/canaried/committed/rolled-back transaction replays, independent evaluator-integrity review, authority-enforcement traces, rollback dry runs or rollback execution over actual state, regression suites over real implementations, monitor-window results, and source-interpretation review are recorded with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove deployed replacement behavior
schema validation does not prove runtime route quality
finite Lean predicates do not implement replacement transactions
evaluator-independence strings do not prove evaluator integrity
rollback receipt strings do not prove rollback execution
regression-result strings do not prove regression quality
no independent runtime, formal-methods, evaluator-integrity, replacement-safety, rollback, regression, or source-interpretation review has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent runtime-systems, evaluator-integrity, replacement-safety, rollback, regression-quality, formal-methods, reviewer-quality, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no authority-enforcement trace over real candidates
no rollback dry run or rollback execution over actual implementation state
no regression suite over real candidate and prior implementations
no monitor-window result over real workload
non_claims: does not promote Capability Replacement and Rollback above argument
does not prove deployed replacement behavior
does not prove runtime route quality
does not prove evaluator integrity or authority enforcement
does not prove rollback execution or regression quality
